title: DRDO Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: DRDO Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
DRDO Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About DRDO Capital India:
DRDO Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DRDO Capital India!
